I'm all for causing a ruckus at #oakmtg but let's keep our chants and support for most poignant moments. The perfect time will come.
Cty. Council letting others speak over their limit, even if just by 30 seconds. I wonder if occupiers get even 5 seconds before reprimand.
#OakMtg Cty. Council switches their shit around so #oo just talks when they wanna talk. Bullshit begets bullshit.

RT @Scaachi: fuck this monday-ass tuesday
@marymad Yeah it sucks, I'm gonna miss Oakland and all the #OccupyOakland folks... but I'm intending to come to the bay regularly. =]
If it comes down to it, may I suggest that "First we got hurt, then we got shields" be our go-to chant at tonight's #OakMtg ? Cheers.
@marymad Yeah, looks like I'll be driving back to NY in early June or so, barring an act of god (per se).
I hope that going to New York, I can help more with #ows and help bring some of the #OccupyOakland flavor that fills my heart now.
I'm excited to jump into the NY startup scene- I feel like there's room to pave new ground there. I've learned so much out here in SF...
That said, I miss my NY vibes. I miss Brooklyn, and I miss the village. Most especially, I miss my peoples. Different level of comfort.
I'm torn up about leaving Oakland, I fell in love with this city, hard, and I feel like it's a part of me now. Oakland has shaped me.
Alright, I hate to say it, especially to my #OccupyOakland folks- but I think my time in California is drawing to a close. To NY very soon!

got ffmpeg nerd sniped first thing on twitter
@ranimolla @zoom_us https://t.co/Bk3vHnAu8j https://t.co/nfL31iPuf2

@ranimolla @zoom_us yeah exactly, you might wanna play with the `-r 30` part, it looks like your GIF is more likely 1-2 frames per second, so it might be `-r 2` to start. If you already have homebrew you should be able to do `brew install ffmpeg` and then run the above with the correct filenames
@ranimolla @zoom_us >ffmpeg -r 30 -i YOURGIF.gif -movflags faststart -pix_fmt yuv420p -vf "scale=trunc(iw/2)*2:trunc(ih/2)*2" YOURMOVIE.mp4
